tech_news.title: Google temporarily offers open Pixel Care+ enrollment for Pixel 9 and 10 - 9to5Google
tech_news.description: Google today announced a limited-time Pixel Care+ open enrollment period for existing Pixel 9 and 10 owners.

tech_news.title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."

tech_news.title: Microsoft Secure Boot has been broken for most of its existence - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: Old and forgotten "shims" Microsoft failed to revoke have made Secure Boot bypasses simple.

tech_news.title: Halo Studios Reportedly Cancels "Big Team Battle" Multiplayer Project - IGN
tech_news.description: A brand new Halo multiplayer game has been scrapped, according to sources.

tech_news.title: Glen Schofield Announces Retirement in Emotional Video: ‘This is an Amazing Industry’ - Insider Gaming
tech_news.description: Glen Schofield has retired from making games after a whopping 35 years in the industry. He announced this with an emotional video.

tech_news.title: Amazon Has the Lowest Price on a GeForce RTX 5070 Graphics Card That I've Seen So Far This Year - IGN
